commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with the lowest ILLIQ metric (0.0013) and tightest AR spread (0.4495%), reflecting deep institutional order flow. Conversely, LSE ranks sixth, hampered by significantly elevated ILLIQ (0.1522) and widest AR spread (0.8014%). Notably, Nasdaq 100 presents a liquidity paradox: second-best ILLIQ but widest Roll spread (1.6268%), suggesting price impact recovery differs markedly from effective spread measures across markets.
